Class KiraCumulativeAgeDisorders

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.DashboardDataItemLogic
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.cumulative.age.KiraCumulativeAgeDisorders
public class KiraCumulativeAgeDisorders extends DashboardDataItemLogic
Methods for the generation of the "kira.*.cumulative.diags.age" items for rsv and kjp.

  • Constructor Details

  • Method Details

    • createStackedBarCharts

      public static StackedBarCharts createStackedBarCharts(KidsRadarDataItemContext kidsRadarDataItemContext, Map<String, Map<String, CoreCaseData>> coreCaseDataByGroups)
      Creates a stacked bar chart item based on the provided case data grouped by diseases.

      The output is completely different from the similar sounding RSV age data item.

      Parameters:
      coreCaseDataByGroups - A map where the key is the disease group name, and the value is another map of individual case data entries.
      Returns:
      A populated StackedBarChartsItem with chart names, bar data, and stack data.
